diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Shows the continuous iterative cycle of capacity planning from data collection to monitoring
elements: Feedback Loop back to Data Collection
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the iterative nature of capacity planning and how each phase feeds into the next

diagrams.title: Utilization vs Response Time Curve
diagrams.description: Graph showing exponential increase in response time as utilization approaches 100%
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing why high utilization causes performance degradation and importance of maintaining headroom

diagrams.title: Iteration and Calibration Process Flow
diagrams.description: Detailed flow showing how iteration and calibration work together
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how calibration improves model accuracy through iterative refinement
